input.sql: UPDATE t_user a JOIN t_user b ON a.user_id = b.user_id AND a.user_name = b.user_name AND a.user_name=? SET a.user_name=?, `b`.password=? WHERE a.user_name=? AND a.user_name like '%san%'

output.sql: UPDATE `encrypt_ds`.t_user a JOIN `encrypt_ds`.t_user b ON a.user_id = b.user_id AND a.user_name = b.user_name AND a.user_name=? SET a.user_name=?, `b`.password=? WHERE a.user_name=? AND a.user_name like '%san%'

input.sql: UPDATE t_user a JOIN t_user b ON `a`.user_id = `b`.user_id AND a.user_name = b.user_name AND a.user_name=? SET a.user_name=?, `b`.password=? WHERE a.user_name=? AND a.user_name like '%san%'

output.sql: UPDATE `encrypt_ds`.t_user a JOIN `encrypt_ds`.t_user b ON `a`.user_id = `b`.user_id AND a.user_name = b.user_name AND a.user_name=? SET a.user_name=?, `b`.password=? WHERE a.user_name=? AND a.user_name like '%san%'

input.sql: UPDATE t_account a, t_account_bak b SET a.certificate_number=?, `b`.certificate_number=? WHERE `a`.password = `b`.password

output.sql: UPDATE `encrypt_ds`.t_account a, `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak b SET a.`cipher_certificate_number` = ?, a.`assisted_query_certificate_number` = ?, a.`like_query_certificate_number` = ?, a.`plain_certificate_number` = ?, `b`.`cipher_certificate_number` = ?, `b`.`assisted_query_certificate_number` = ?, `b`.`like_query_certificate_number` = ?, `b`.`plain_certificate_number` = ? WHERE `a`.`plain_password` = `b`.`plain_password`
output.parameters: encrypt_cert1, assisted_query_cert1, like_query_cert1, cert1, encrypt_cert2, assisted_query_cert2, like_query_cert2, cert2
